---
name: Model Request
about: Request support for a new model
title: "[MODEL] "
labels: ["model-request"]
assignees: ''
---

## Model name

What's the model name? (e.g., `my-model:13b`)

## Parameter count

How many parameters? (e.g., 7B, 13B, 32B, 70B)

## Context window

What's the context window size? (e.g., 4096, 8192, 16384, 128000)

## Recommended profile

Which profile do you think fits best?

- **small** (7-14B) — Full entries, max 3
- **medium** (14-32B) — Condensed entries, max 5
- **large** (30B+) — Reference entries, max 8

## Model link

Link to the model's documentation or HuggingFace page.
